footer.description: Discover amazing places around the world and plan your next adventure.

countrySelection.title: Begin your journey across the world
countrySelection.subtitle: Choose your destination and discover personalized travel experiences tailored just for you.
countrySelection.selectRegion: Select a region to explore its destinations

countrySelection.noDescription: No description available for this country.

continentDesc.asia: Discover ancient temples, bustling markets, and breathtaking landscapes across the diverse countries of Asia.
continentDesc.europe: Explore historic cities, charming villages, and stunning architecture throughout the European continent.
continentDesc.northAmerica: Experience vast landscapes, vibrant cities, and natural wonders across North America.
continentDesc.southAmerica: Journey through lush rainforests, ancient ruins, and vibrant cultures of South America.
continentDesc.africa: Venture across savannas, deserts, and diverse cultures in the beautiful continent of Africa.
continentDesc.oceania: Discover paradise islands, unique wildlife, and stunning coastal landscapes in Oceania.
